_note: Derived from images/manifest.json's scenario_front rows (v5 #05b). No expansion field: the manifest does not carry one and no other source in this repo knows what a scenario is. One scenario, Varied Terrains, has no scenario_back in the manifest - the tile only ever shows the front (#04), so that absence has no effect here. Difficulty added by phase-4 #20: transcribed verbatim from the Spirit Island Wiki, 2026-07-13 — the List_of_Scenarios page cross-checked against each ambiguous scenario's own page (Second Wave, Powers Long Forgotten, Elemental Invocation, Destiny Unfolds, Surges of Colonization). Qualified values (1*, -1*, +/- 1) are kept verbatim, not collapsed to numbers. The wiki prints one +2/+7 for Surges of Colonization; the two rows here split it normal/larger per that page's LARGER SURGES (HIGHER DIFFICULTY) rules text. Fetch trail in .scratch/phase-4/issues/20-scenario-difficulty.md.
